cases.claim: The four named regression test files pass with 79 pass, 0 fail, and 2 skip.
cases.method: Ran the exact requested Bun command.
cases.actual: 77 pass, 2 skip, 2 fail across 81 tests. Both failures are in packages/coding-agent/test/compaction.test.ts: remote compaction setting > forwards an explicit initiator override to local summarization requests (expected completeSimpleSpy 3 calls, received 2), and remote compaction setting > uses local summarization when remote compaction is disabled (expected completeSpy 3 calls, received 2).

cases.claim: The existing mid-run compaction and maintenance regression suites exist and cover corrected threshold trigger behavior.
cases.method: Read both test files; searched their test descriptions/assertions for threshold and mid-run behavior; ran each file independently.
cases.actual: Both files exist. agent-session-midrun-compaction.test.ts contains the threshold-trigger scenario "runs threshold maintenance mid-loop and resumes without a provider overflow" and asserts a "threshold" compaction reason; it passed 18 tests, 0 fail. agent-session-midrun-maintenance.test.ts covers below, exactly-at, and above-threshold outcomes; it passed 13 tests, 0 fail.

cases.claim: Mined data has zero reactive compactions from 2026-07-15 onward and 16 of 228 premature records that are temporally non-clustered.
cases.method: Parsed artifacts/compaction-mining-v2.json with Python; filtered compactionEvidence by classification and UTC timestamp, and computed premature record dates and Monday week starts.
cases.actual: 228 total records; 0 reactive records with timestamp >= 2026-07-15; 16 premature records. Premature dates span 2026-06-18 through 2026-07-16 and five week starts: 2026-06-15, 2026-06-22, 2026-06-29, 2026-07-06, 2026-07-13.

cases.claim: Default thresholds are 323000 for a 380000-token window and 340000 for a 400000-token window using window - max(floor(0.15 * window), 16384).
All four evidence artifacts referenced by the conclusion document exist.
cases.method: Read each referenced artifact from the worktree.

overall: fail: the conclusion's current-state assertion that the exact four-file Bun command yields 79 pass and 0 fail does not hold in this worktree; it yielded 77 pass, 2 skip, and 2 fail. All other checked claims passed.

commands.result: 228 records; 0 reactive at/after 2026-07-15; 16 premature spanning five Monday weeks
